objects.name: Frontier AI Is Collapsing the Exploit Window. Here’s How Defenders Must Respond.
objects.description: The New York Times has a long article where the author lays out an impressive array of circumstantial evidence that the inventor of Bitcoin is the cypherpunk Adam Back. The article is convincing, but it’s written to be convincing. I can’t remember if I ever met Adam.

external_references.description: Frontier AI Is Collapsing the Exploit Window. Here’s How Defenders Must Respond.
